greeting.morning: Good morning! How can I simplify your day?
greeting.afternoon: Good afternoon! How can I help?
greeting.evening: Good evening! Shall we review the day?

decision_prompt: Based on your context, I recommend: {{recommendation}}

feedback.accepted: Great! I'll learn from this choice.
feedback.ask_why: Can you tell me why you rejected it? This helps me improve.

context.sleep_bad: I noticed you slept poorly. I'll adjust my suggestions.
context.high_energy: You have high energy! Great time for important tasks.
context.low_energy: Low energy detected. I'll suggest lighter tasks.
context.busy_day: Busy day ahead. I'll prioritize the essentials.

errors.no_context: I need more context to help better.
errors.unavailable: I'm temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
